Build-Depends: cmake, debhelper-compat (= 13), dh-sequence-python3, libopencv-dev, libpython3-dev, libstb-dev, pkgconf, python3-dev:native, python3-nanobind (>= 2.11), python3-numpy <!nocheck>, python3-opencv <!nocheck>, python3-pil <!nocheck>, python3-scikit-build-core, qt6-base-dev, qt6-declarative-dev, qt6-multimedia-dev
Description: C++ port of ZXing library ZXing-C++ ("zebra crossing") is an open-source, multi-format 1D/2D barcode image processing library implemented in C++. . It was originally ported from the Java ZXing library but has been developed further and now includes many improvements in terms of runtime and detection performance. It can both read and write barcodes in a number of formats: QR Code, DataMatrix, Aztec, PDF417, EAN/UPC, DataBar, Code 39, Code 93, Code 128, Codabar, ITF and more.
Package-List: libzxing-dev deb libdevel optional arch=any libzxing4 deb libs optional arch=any python3-zxing-cpp deb python optional arch=any zxing-cpp-tools deb utils optional arch=any
